+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+

+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });

+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);

+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;

+            });

+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+

+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)

+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',

+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+

+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds

+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })

+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+

       isMounted = false;

+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+

       isMounted = false;

+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,

+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+

+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });

+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })

+    const fetchChat = () => {
+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

+            // Transform timestamp to readable time

+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));

+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;

+              return prev;
+            });

+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)

+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });

+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })

+    const fetchChat = () => {
+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

+            // Transform timestamp to readable time

+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));

+      authenticatedFetch(getApiUrl(`/tables/${tableId}/chat`))
+        .then((res) => res.json())
+        .then((data) => {
+          if (!isMounted) return;
+          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)
+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;

+              return prev;
+            });

+            // Transform timestamp to readable time
+            // Also map sender_avatar (PostgreSQL snake_case) to senderAvatar (camelCase expected by frontend)

+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));

+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders

+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });

+            const formattedData = data.map((msg: any) => ({
+              ...msg,
+              time: msg.timestamp ? dayjs(Number(msg.timestamp)).format('MMM D, HH:mm') : '',
+              senderAvatar: msg.senderAvatar || msg.sender_avatar || undefined,
+            }));
+
+            // If first load, sync the ref immediately to prevent notification
+            if (isFirstLoadRef.current) {
+              prevMessageCountRef.current = formattedData.length;
+              isFirstLoadRef.current = false;
+            }
+
+            setBoardChatMessages(prev => {
+              // Compare content only to avoid unnecessary re-renders
+              if (JSON.stringify(prev) !== JSON.stringify(formattedData)) {
+                return formattedData;
+              }
+              return prev;
+            });
+          }
+        })
+        .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch chat messages", err));
+    };
+
+    fetchChat(); // Initial fetch
+    const intervalId = setInterval(fetchChat, 4000); // Poll every 4 seconds
+
     return () => {
       isMounted = false;
       clearInterval(intervalId);
     };
-  }, [tableId, fetchChatMessages]);
+  }, [tableId]);

                         ml: i > 0 ? -1 : 0,
